guidance.en: The date and time of your DVRO hearing, set by the court. This is when both parties appear before the judge to determine whether a permanent restraining order will be issued.
guidance.es: La fecha y hora de su audiencia de orden de restricción.

guidance.en: The specific courthouse address and department number where the hearing will take place.
guidance.es: La dirección específica del tribunal y número de departamento.

guidance.en: This form provides instructions: the protected person must attend the hearing; the restrained person may file a DV-120 response before the hearing; both parties can present evidence and witnesses.
guidance.es: Este formulario proporciona instrucciones para ambas partes.
